healthcheck/status read Bearer auth from sandbox auth file
materialization surfaces remain secondary and currently unproven
why_not_materialization_first: launch/materialization verification would still route through a live attestation owner currently blocked by HTTP 401

why_not_combined: would fuse two repair domains with different write surfaces

declared_rollback_expectations: snapshot sandbox auth.json before mutation and restore it byte-for-byte on failure
